MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIEMERS, ROBERT F. COURT TRIAL SET FOR FEB-01-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 220 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

ROOM 220, JUDGE CHAITIN, CSAUCEDA, CSR, GGOROSIN, CLERK 10:40 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PLTF PRESENT WITH MARC SEIDENFELD, DEFTS PRESENT W/ COUNSEL SYDNEY JAY HALL. WITNESS S/E, EXHIBITS INTRODUCED. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD, PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAYURAN, RAMON PAYURAN, JUDITH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 610 CORTLAND AVE, #1, ASF, CA, STAYED UNTIL MAR-30-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES RENTS FOR JAN, FEB, & MAR; UPON SURRENDER OF KEY BY DEFT, PLTF WILL PAY DEFT THE SUM OF $3500; EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS
